findings.summary: Operator-supplied PDF for slot 07 was the wrong Okamoto paper.

expected.citation: Okamoto, K. "Studies on the Painlevé equations IV. Third Painlevé equation P_III." Funkcialaj Ekvacioj 30 (1987), 305–332.
expected.needed_section: Lax pair construction for P_III(D_6) in canonical Hamiltonian normalisation

received.citation: Okamoto, K. "Studies on the Painlevé Equations. I. Sixth Painlevé Equation P_VI." Annali di Matematica Pura ed Applicata (IV), Vol. CXLVI (1987), 337–381.
received.title_page_excerpt: Studies on the Painlevé Equations (*). I. - Sixth Painlevé Equation P_VI. KAZUO OKAMOTO
received.last_page_footer: KAZUO OKAMOTO: Studies on the Painlevé equations, I 381
received.submission_dates: Entrata in Redazione l'8 agosto 1985; versione riveduta il 7 novembre 1985

findings.disposition: File relocated from slot-07 path to literature/g3b_2026-05-03/supplementary/okamoto_1987_part_I_painleve_VI_AnnMat.pdf to remove the misleading filename while preserving the artefact for any future P_VI-related work. Slot 07 (target FE 30 P_III) remains UNFILLED. SHA256SUMS.txt amended with full disposition note.
findings.strategic_implication: Part I (P_VI) provides the canonical Hamiltonian / affine-Weyl-group W(F_4) framework of the Okamoto Painlevé series and could be useful as a parallel-structure reference, but it does NOT contain the P_III(D_6) Lax pair required for CC-VQUAD-PIII-NORMALIZATION-MAP / G22 closure. Effective acquisition outcome for this retry is the same as 'not acquired' for the M6 purpose.
findings.synthesizer_arbitration_request: Note for next-cycle prompt drafting: when re-firing R5 for the FE 30 P_III target, narrow filename verification at acquisition time (require 'équations IV' or 'Third Painlevé' string match on title-page OCR before accepting), and consider adding NUMDAM (Funkcialaj Ekvacioj is hosted there) as a primary route ahead of Project Euclid — Project Euclid does not appear to carry FE backlist.
